title: Choose Python TUI stack and app architecture
description: Why this exists: the client should be maintainable and testable, with transport, protocol, state, and presentation separated. What needs to be done: choose the TUI framework and libraries, likely Textual/Rich or a similarly testable terminal UI stack; define module boundaries for transports, protocol adapters, app state, view models, widgets, command handling, and persistence. Acceptance criteria: library choices are documented in Beads notes or implementation docs; transport interfaces allow BLE and IP/CoAP implementations behind one app model; unit-testable boundaries are defined; dependency footprint is acceptable for macOS and Linux developer machines.
